metadata.title: We Go On, But We Cannot For Much Longer
metadata.artist: And We Walk Endlessly Towards The Sun
tracklist: 01 And We Walk Endlessly Towards The Sun - We Are Nothing; Our Circle Closes
02 And We Walk Endlessly Towards The Sun - We Hurt, We Walk Through The Emptiness
03 And We Walk Endlessly Towards The Sun - We Go On, But We Cannot For Much Longer
04 And We Walk Endlessly Towards The Sun - No One Is Left To Mourn Us; Hollow And Burned, We Continue To Walk
